  'headline': 'Alkermes Starts Phase 3 Orexin Trials As Narcolepsy Story '

  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'Alkermes (NasdaqGS:ALKS) has started Phase 3 Brilliance Studies '
